sections.headline: I BUILD THINGS
sections.subheadline: NO FLUFF. NO BULLSHIT. JUST WORK THAT WORKS.

sections.heading: WHO I AM
sections.body:
I'm a developer who cares about shipping. Not shipping features—shipping products that people actually use. I've been doing this for 8 years, working with startups and Fortune 500 companies alike.

My philosophy is simple: build fast, measure, iterate. Don't overthink it. The best code is code that ships.

Currently based in Brooklyn, working remotely with teams around the world.

items.title: E-COMMERCE PLATFORM
items.description: Built a headless e-commerce platform handling $50M+ in annual transactions. 99.9% uptime.

items.title: REAL-TIME ANALYTICS
items.description: Dashboard processing 1M+ events per second. Built with Go and WebSockets.

items.title: MOBILE APP
items.description: React Native app with 500K+ downloads. 4.8 star rating.

items.title: API INFRASTRUCTURE
items.description: Scaled API from 10K to 10M requests per day. Implemented rate limiting and caching.

sections.heading: LET'S WORK TOGETHER
